creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
php -v hangs when told through /usr/local/etc/php/extensions.ini to load mysql.so
This behaviour began after upgrading to MySQL 5.5.8 and PHP 5.3.4.
security/rkhunter is also affected, even on clean install.

How-To-Repeat: Install or upgrade databases/mysql55-server and databases/php5-mysql.
